title: AgentFrontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of canonical agent files ($TEAM_AGENTS/<name>.md and $AGENTS_GLOBAL/<name>.md). Every field defined in _shared.md section 7 is covered.

provider.description: LLM inference provider. Must be a key in providers.json.

egress_consent.description: Consent status for external-provider egress. 'none' for local providers; 'external:<date>' when user has granted egress consent.

employee_id.description: Unique employee ID in emp-NNN format.

team.description: Team name the agent belongs to. null for outsource/freelance.

role.description: Role key matching a key in models-config.json defaults_by_role.

reports_to.description: Name of the agent this one reports to, or null.

hired_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the agent was hired.

effort_preset.description: Default effort allocation for this agent.

buddy.description: Name of the onboarding buddy, or null.

hired_by_teams.description: List of team names that hired this freelance agent. Empty for permanent.

secondary_teams.description: List of secondary team names for matrix assignment. Empty for non-seconded agents.

contract_type.description: Contract type for freelance agents. null for permanent.

contract_start.description: Contract start date (YYYY-MM-DD). null for permanent or if not set.

contract_end.description: Contract end date (YYYY-MM-DD). null for open-ended or permanent.

rate.description: Rate string for freelance agents. null for permanent.

onboard_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when onboarding was completed. Optional.

onboard_status.description: Onboarding completion status. Optional; only value is 'done'.

offboard_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when off-boarding was completed. Optional.

offboard_status.description: Off-boarding status. Optional; values are 'pending' or 'done'.

promotion_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of last promotion. Optional.

demotion_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) of last demotion. Optional.

fired_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the agent was fired. Optional.

updated_at.description: ISO-8601 date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the agent record was last updated. Optional.

tools.description: List of canonical tool names this agent is authorized to use. Populated from tools-config.json shared_tools + role_tools at hire time.
